description_long: This is a cubic, modern cup with a deep, square-shaped cavity and thick, straight walls. The exterior is predominantly black, accented by bold, vertical white panels on two opposing sides, giving it a striking, geometric appearance. The cup lacks a handle and lid, and its rim is broad and flat, suggesting a sturdy build. The interior is hollow and open, suitable for holding liquids or small items. The design is minimalist, with no visible branding, patterns, or decorative elements. Its overall form and color scheme make it suitable for contemporary urban environments, such as cafes or public spaces.
description: A modern, cubic black cup with bold white vertical accents and a deep, square cavity. Minimalist and handleless, it features a sturdy, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cup's square opening and prominent white vertical panels flanking a central black section.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a solid black face with the white panels barely visible, emphasizing the cup's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the same white vertical panels and square cavity visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is similar to view 1, showing a solid black face with minimal white panel visibility.
